message:
feat(stdio): implement foreign FILE* adoption infrastructure (bd-9chy.16)

Add bloom filter-based ownership detection and foreign FILE* adoption:

- Add PointerBloomFilter for O(1) "is this FILE* ours?" pre-check (~10ns)
- Add FOREIGN_ADOPTION_MAP to track foreign -> native slot mappings
- Implement adopt_foreign_file() to extract fd from foreign FILE* at
  offset 0x70 (_fileno) and create NativeFile wrapper
- Add verify_native_file() for full ownership verification after bloom hit
- Register stdin/stdout/stderr in bloom filter at initialization
- Update classify_stream_for_locking to use bloom filter pre-check

This enables FrankenLibC to adopt FILE* pointers from host glibc (e.g.,
from dlopened libraries) into the native registry for proper handling.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
